description: CCVS control catalog. Maps governance controls to requirements and evidence types. Every production claim gate must trace back to at least one control in this catalog with current signed evidence.

controls.name: Build Provenance
controls.description: Every production artifact must have SLSA-aligned build provenance signed by the hosted build platform.
controls.acceptance_criteria: provenance.json exists; subject digest matches release artifact; builder_id is an expected hosted runner; cosign verify-blob passes with expected identity and issuer

controls.name: Unit Test Evidence
controls.description: All production code must have signed unit test evidence meeting per-repo coverage thresholds.
controls.acceptance_criteria: tests_passed > 0; coverage.lines >= threshold; signed Sigstore bundle exists; chain_hash continuous from previous run

controls.name: Integration Test Evidence
controls.description: Critical integration paths must have signed integration test evidence with masked external interactions.
controls.acceptance_criteria: decision_trace present; service_graph_ref present; masked_requests logged; chain_hash continuous

controls.name: Adversarial and Replay Test Evidence
controls.description: Gate and security-critical paths must pass adversarial and replay tests with detection latency within bounds.
controls.acceptance_criteria: all attack vectors pass; replay nonce rejected with detection_latency_ms < 1000; replay_store_hit confirmed

controls.name: Human Oversight Record
controls.description: High-severity decisions must have a signed oversight record with segregation-of-duties verification.
controls.acceptance_criteria: approver_identity present; approver_identity != requester_identity (SoD); competence_ref valid; signed bundle exists and verifies

controls.name: Software Bill of Materials
controls.description: Every release must have an SBOM meeting NTIA minimum elements in SPDX or CycloneDX format bound to the release digest.
controls.acceptance_criteria: SPDX or CycloneDX schema validates; supplier/name/version/identifier/dependency/author/timestamp all present; SBOM digest bound to release artifact digest

controls.name: Immutable Evidence Retention
controls.description: Production evidence must be uploaded to WORM-compliant object storage with verifiable retention receipts.
controls.acceptance_criteria: Object Lock COMPLIANCE mode enabled; Retain-Until-Date set per retention policy; upload receipt retrievable and matches object version ID

controls.name: Mutation Testing Gate
controls.description: Critical governance paths must pass mutation score thresholds before a Claim Passed gate is asserted.
controls.acceptance_criteria: mutation_score >= 95 for proof/hash/replay paths; >= 90 for gate/governance/command paths; signed mutation evidence bundle exists

requirement_registry.ISO42001-A.6.2: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A, Control A.6.2 – AI system testing
requirement_registry.ISO42001-A.4.3: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A, Control A.4.3 – Human oversight of AI systems
requirement_registry.ISO42001-A.9.1: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A, Control A.9.1 – Record-keeping
requirement_registry.EU-AI-ACT-ART9: EU AI Act Article 9 – Risk management system
requirement_registry.EU-AI-ACT-ART14: EU AI Act Article 14 – Human oversight
requirement_registry.SLSA-BUILD-L2: SLSA v1.0 Build Track Level 2 – hosted build platform provenance
requirement_registry.SLSA-BUILD-L3: SLSA v1.0 Build Track Level 3 – hardened builds
